stemHtml: What effect will an increase in humidity have on piston engines and gas turbine engines?

options.a: It will cause no change in performance in either type of engine.
options.b: Piston engines will suffer from worse degradation in performance than turbine engines.
options.c: Turbine engines will suffer from worse degradation in performance than piston engines.
options.d: Both engine types will suffer from similar degradation.
